title: You Deleted Everything and AWS Is Still Charging You
summary: AWS Developers shares a practical cleanup checklist to identify hidden charges that persist after deleting resources, including RDS snapshots, EBS volumes, elastic IPs, and NAT gateways. The video recommends tracking billing, monitoring usual suspects, and setting up billing alarms to avoid surprise charges on AWS accounts.
